creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 248345
Patch for eom

Disable processing of ja and ko PO files as these causes reproducable crashes of itstool during build

Compile tested on FreeBSD 14.0 (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.0-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)
